title: Class Teacher
salary_range: Competitive hourly wage based on Finnish collective agreements.
meta_description: Apply now for a Class Teacher role at Kirkkonummen kunta. Join a growing team and build your career in Kirkkonummi.
description: We are looking for an enthusiastic and skilled Class Teacher to join our Finnish-language elementary school in Masala. With approximately 260 students across grades 1-6, we offer a warm and supportive community where every individual is valued and respected. Our core values include responsibility, equality, individuality, and community. We provide excellent exercise, cultural, and wellness benefits, as well as free swimming at the Kirkkonummi pool. A language-aware approach to teaching ensures that each student's needs are met effectively. The position offers a permanent contract with a salary determined by OVTES collective agreement, including a probationary period of half the term duration.
what_we_expect: Skill and desire to teach textile work and exercise.
Excellent cooperation, interaction, and work community skills.
job_responsibilities: Support students' growth, development, and well-being.
search_keywords: Class Teacher Kirkkonummen kunta Kirkkonummi other

title: Primary Education Teacher
salary_range: Competitive hourly wage based on Finnish collective agreements.
meta_description: Exciting Primary Education Teacher position available at Oulun kaupunki in Oulu. Check requirements and submit your application today.
description: Flexible basic education teacher, Talvikanga school We are looking for a FLEXIBLE PRIMARY EDUCATION TEACHER position at Talvikanga school. Talvikangkaa school is a unified elementary school located in the greater Korvensuora area. The classes are located in two buildings in the same courtyard; 1-2 grade students and jopo students study in the Talvikangka multipurpose hall at Tuiskutie 10 and grades 3-9 on the side of the big school at Tuiskutie 11. There are about 650 students in total, of which 100 are in grades 1-2, 221 are in grades 3-6, and 333 are in grades 7-9. There are approximately 60 teaching staff in total. The strength of our school is high-quality basic education, which enables a successful orientation to further studies.
what_we_expect: Higher university degree and teacher qualification.
Experience teaching flexible basic education classes.
Talvikangkaa school is a unified elementary school located in the greater Korvensuora area.
job_responsibilities: Support students in obtaining basic education certificates through the Jopo class.
Talvikangkaa school is a unified elementary school located in the greater Korvensuora area.
what_we_offer: Salary determined by official collective agreement.
Talvikangkaa school is a unified elementary school located in the greater Korvensuora area.
